news.summary: The war in Iran has once again exposed Europe’s energy vulnerability. A friendly source at home would seem to be ideal. But it’s not that easy.

news.headline: FIFA faces pressure to call on Trump to stop ICE raids at 2026 World Cup
news.summary: The Athletic reports FIFA chief Gianni Infantino is receptive to a proposal to ask Trump for a moratorium on ICE raids.

news.headline: Why are global views of the US getting worse?
news.summary: We discuss the global standing of the US after launching war against Iran and years of worsening views of the nation.
